subject: ❗QUADRUPLE your impact❗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Effective today: TRIPLE-MATCH is in effect to maximize your support before Saturday's FEC deadline (only for a limited time)!
---
[ ](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
*****ANNOUNCEMENT: ALL GIFTS TRIPLE-MATCHED***
[Pitch in today to make QUADRUPLE the impact >> ](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Team -- In the past year:

* ➢ **FIRST** , Trump signed a tax scam that raised taxes on middle-class families, sabotaged Obamacare, and added a trillion dollars to our deficit.

* ➢ **THEN** , he released a budget that would slash billions from Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security to pay for the tax scam's huge corporate tax breaks.

* ➢ **NOW** , GOP super PACs are pledging to spend millions of dollars attacking our Democratic candidates because they stood up to Trump's reckless scheme.

We can't let GOP billionaires like the Koch brothers buy the 2018 elections and allow Trump's agenda to sail through without a fight. We have to strike back right away and we're counting on you.

**So effective today: TRIPLE-MATCH is in effect to maximize your support toward our $300,000 goal before Saturday 's FEC deadline. Pitch in ASAP (it's only for a limited time)!**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=1&refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=5&refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=15&refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=25&refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=35&refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

We're counting on a strong response to prove we're not done fighting -- we're just getting started. This is our chance to:

* Show Senate Democrats we have their backs for the fights ahead

* Gather grassroots momentum to mobilize Democratic campaigns

* Put Donald Trump and the GOP on notice for their extreme actions

[**You can make a huge impact right now. Pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift before Saturday 's deadline >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180328-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks for standing with us,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954ca29/2b07114c/16be0da41/731e3818/3770129259/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954ca29/2b07114c/16be0da41/731e381b/3770129259/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954ca29/2b07114c/16be0da41/731e381a/3770129259/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Sherrod
subject: Can you join Sherrod at the Indians game?
body:
|
---
| | Peter -- We want to make sure you saw Sherrod's note about joining him at a Cleveland Indians game next Friday! [**_All you have to do is chip in $5, or whatever you can (any amount counts!), and you'll be automatically entered to attend the first home game of the Indians' season with Sherrod! <<_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ea/1726753453/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?refcode=sbe180328c_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Not to get all cheesy on you, but if we're going to have a home-run on Election Day, then we need to knock our FEC goal out of the park. The only way that happens is if all of us step up to the plate -- with $1, $5, or our average online contribution of $26. [**_Be a part of this. Don't miss your chance to join us next Friday, April 6th at Progressive Field by chipping in a few bucks towards Sherrod's FEC goal to be automatically entered._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ea/1726753453/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?refcode=sbe180328c_m_other&refcode2=3268183") We couldn't do it without you, Peter(seriously). Team Sherrod _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: You + Me + Season Home Opener_ There are few things more memorable than walking into a baseball field on the first day of the season. It's a singular experience. I can already picture the brilliant green outfield, fresh dirt on the pitcher's mound, and the crack of a bat connecting with a fastball. Rooting for the Cleveland Indians is one of my favorite pastimes. If you're a big fan too, I have a contest you should definitely enter. [**_You and a guest can join me at the Cleveland Indians' first home game of the baseball season at Progressive Field on April 6th! All you have to do is give a few bucks toward our FEC goal and you will be automatically entered for a chance to join me for the game._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ea/1726753453/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?refcode=sbe180328c_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059e9/1726753453/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180328c_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059e9/1726753453/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180328c_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059e9/1726753453/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180328c_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ea/1726753453/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?refcode=sbe180328c_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Of course, there's another reason you should contribute to our FEC goal. And it's that we can't afford to miss our mark. Representing Ohio in the Senate is one of the most important things I'll ever do. I don't take it lightly. Every day I go into work with the same goal: to fight for working families. Often times that means standing up to lobbyists, big banks, insurance companies -- and the lawmakers they support. But I'll never stop fighting this fight. My work is not over until we've fixed our system so people working 40 hours a week can afford health coverage, put food on the table for their families, save for retirement, and be able to enjoy their lives -- maybe even go to the ballpark now and then. **This is exactly why special interest groups are against me.** They would much rather elect a senator who will be a shill for corporate interests than a champion for Ohio families. We can strike out special interest groups. We overcame their spending in 2012 -- and we will again as long as our grassroots team shows up to play from now until November. Help us get on track to reach our FEC goal. [**_Chip in $5 and be automatically entered for a chance to have you and a friend join me on April 6th._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ea/1726753453/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI4YyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180328c?refcode=sbe180328c_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059e8/1726753453/VEsB/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are legal residents of 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Entries must be received between March 23 and March 28, 2018. You may enter by contributing here [https://www.sherrodbrown.com/cleveland-indians-season-opener-contest-sponsor](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ef/1726753453/VEsO/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/cleveland-indians-season-opener-contest-sponsor"). Alternatively, you can enter without contributing by clicking here [https://www.sherrodbrown.com/cleveland-indians-season-opener-contest-non-sponsor](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ee/1726753453/VEsP/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/cleveland-indians-season-opener-contest-non-sponsor"). One winner will be selected to attend a baseball game with Sherrod Brown: two round-trip tickets within the continental U.S. to a destination to be chosen at the sole discretion of Sponsor, hotel accommodations, and attendance at a baseball game with Sherrod Brown. (approximate retail value of prize package $1,850). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [https://www.sherrodbrown.com/season-opener-contest-rules](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ed/1726753453/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/season-opener-contest-rules"). Sponsor: Friends of Sherrod Brown, 3867 West Market Street, Ste. 289, Akron, OH 44333.
---
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb73/4462dc26/42b7a0ee/200059ec/1726753453/VEsHBA/ "http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/unsubscribe")

name: kyrsten sinema
subject: haven't heard from you yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | |
Hey there -- My team and I have been emailing a lot, but it's critical we do everything we can to raise the last $100,000 we need before we have to report our numbers.

These numbers will be public. Everyone will be able to see whether we have the resources we need to take on Joe Arpaio and the extremists who think they can buy this seat.

Use this link to help us unlock the match and take our work to the next level:

[_**http://act.kyrstensinema.com/unlock-the-match**_](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-mar-eoq18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Phoenix&state=AZ&zip=85002&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomunlockthematch&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180328_4_7&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180328_4_7&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180328_4_7")

Thanks so much,

KS |

name: Kamala Harris
subject: If we want to take back Congress...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
I truly believe that 2018 will be the most important election we've had in my lifetime, Derek.
---
I truly believe that 2018 will be the most important election we've had in my lifetime, Derek.

We are at a critical point in our nation's history -- this election isn't just about our children's future, it's about the future of our democracy.

This moment requires each and every one of us to be engaged. If we want to take back control of Congress this year, we must seize every moment between now and November as an opportunity to organize.

**If you're ready to bring the fight to the Republican Party this year, make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before Saturday's important fundraising deadline.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405225c0/4067b0a/52d6dcca3/7e4c6758/3291106935/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&source=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&refcode=em_20180329_kh_v2s2")

[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405225c0/4067b0a/52d6dcca3/7e4c6764/3291106935/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&source=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&refcode=em_20180329_kh_v2s2")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405225c0/4067b0a/52d6dcca3/7e4c6765/3291106935/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-kh-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&source=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&refcode=em_20180329_kh_v2s2")
** I don't know about you, but I was so glad to put 2017 in the rearview mirror -- the only path to victory in November is to remain focused on the road in front of us, not on the fights behind us.

Let's remember what Dolores Huerta once said, "Every moment is an organizing opportunity, every person a potential activist, every minute a chance to change the world."

We can't afford to waste even a second, Derek. Every moment between now and November is critical to helping Democrats win -- and right now I am counting on you to step up before Saturday's important deadline.

Together we will ensure that Democrats across the country have the resources they need to organize and win.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405225c0/4067b0a/52d6dcca3/7e4c6762/3291106935/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-kh-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Chip+in++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+ma&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&source=em_20180329_kh_v2s2&refcode=em_20180329_kh_v2s2")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Kamala Harris

name: The White House
subject: The next phase of America’s comeback
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=175db667b47b25f00dc37e33950d423102757102dd4221d983d638bace6da9f5afa29882b9b1ef3b764901b8b148eebb10ce3d3bbf59f325

The next phase of America’s comeback

Last month, President Donald J. Trump called upon Congress and State and local governments to embrace his Infrastructure Initiative, which aims to spur $1.5 trillion in investment through a combination of Federal funding and incentivized non-Federal funding.

Today, the President travels to Ohio to make his case directly to the American people. He will visit an expansive training site for members of the International Union of Operating Engineers, a diversified trade union that includes heavy equipment operators, mechanics and surveyors, and stationary engineers.

Here is what he will tell Ohioans:

- This Administration is fighting every day to protect, defend, and grow American jobs. That includes eliminating a record number of job-killing regulations.
- We have unleashed American energy independence – foreign energy imports are at their lowest level in nearly 40 years.
- The next phase of America’s economic comeback is to rebuild America’s crumbling infrastructure. We will breathe new life into our run-down highways, railways, and waterways, and we will transform our roads and bridges—all under budget and ahead of schedule.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=175db667b47b25f0101ae51d1629b1f8f4126c55682081771decd8cd599a234c0aa00113d2128a08b0061dfb300d4fa0863663467c8a6394
Watch President Trump’s speech to Ohio live at 2:00 p.m. ET.

Learn more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=175db667b47b25f0b52d643c0e65d846800a6438fe50e46b84657fca36150c78b742cd759e48e3c6ec205671276addf6a7036ca7ecad39a5
How fixing infrastructure will build a stronger economy

Fixing bad trade deals

Since the U.S.-Korea Trade Agreement (KORUS) went into effect in 2012, the U.S. trade in goods deficit has grown from $13.2 billion to $22.9 billion—an increase of 73 percent. In July of last year, at the direction of President Trump, U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer began negotiations with South Korea to amend KORUS.

As a result, South Korea is doubling the number of American automobiles that can enter its market each year using U.S. safety standards from 25,000 to 50,000 per manufacturer. South Korea also agreed to address its onerous and costly customs procedures that have hindered U.S. exports, as well as limit its steel imports into the United States with a product-specific quota.

“We want to make a deal that’s fair for the United States and fair for South Korea,” President Trump said. And thanks to Trade Rep. Lighthizer’s work, the Administration has done just that.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=175db667b47b25f0d65b061dfa62fd0e510d8f1561db1dd3493d7d328211bc7168526115395c69bbf34a5a103796f5e02ba26d2858005402
Learn more about how President Trump is keeping his promise to fix the U.S.-Korea Free Trade Agreement.

The next generation of conservative leaders

Attendees at the White House “Generation Next” forum last week included millennials who are small business owners, farmers, journalists, policy analysts, and leaders on college campuses. Charlie Kirk, founder of the conservative nonprofit Turning Point USA, led a Q&A with President Trump in front of about 150 of these young men and women.

A few of President Trump’s quotes from the conversation:

- In response to a question about free speech on college campuses: “I think the numbers are actually much different than people think. I think we have a lot of support.”
- On the economy: “You know, we were at about 1.2 percent GDP. We’ve now hit 3, and another 3, and a 3.2. . . . Our businesses are flourishing.”
- On a former classmate who demonstrates the importance of vocational schools: “That person could fix an engine or a motor so—he was incredible. Blind folded.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=175db667b47b25f049141dfc5d0a67116fa9f3a437ba7ab645f71352422116d77f36d1ffe7a6f6eb2da410ba936edcc7d94fb32299061830
More: President Trump Welcomes the Next Generation of Conservative Leaders

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump at a speech on the opioid crisis | March 19, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump travels to Richfield, Ohio, to deliver remarks on the Infrastructure Initiative.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=175db667b47b25f0e3164f8f9da9d9cae2b2f7a28ab9bdf7cdc65f3667aa05810d0d61b261416e959ef6140afbd0076f92acd28ee17d1558
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=175db667b47b25f047338b61685058285e9f2d55abfec6a73508d0795ee404feac0075ad9594b5f3e0ef2441d5f201f0207c481d8bf6b969
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4251a27582730f94b0efe062b03d01a15ba9d10b3c8e62f53e9ad87eb11e77eac00271a4fa53da54645e6a6b4abfb87e75aaf691fd79c26b5
Unsubscribe

name: Rumor
subject: Paul Ryan might quit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Randy Bryce for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/StfwWksW8-irPj0HqP3fZg==/0eo-G_Bj9EVlb0D-k54eAg==?utm_campaign=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=km&refcode=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%FIRSTNAME%%&lastname=%%LASTNAME%%&city=%%CITY%%&state=%%STATE_ABBR%%&zip=%%ZIP%%&phone=%%HOMEPHONE%%&occupation=%%OCCUPATION%%&employer=%%EMPLOYER%%)
**" 'Rumor mill' says Ryan headed for exit" \- _The Hill, 03/26/18_**
The rumor-mill is always churning out something. But you know what's always true? Working people need a voice in their democracy -- and Randy Bryce is the ironworker who will fight for them in Congress.

**[We're 91% of the way to our $2 million end-of-quarter fundraising goal. Chip in $3 or more to make sure we elect Randy Bryce in November, regardless of what Paul Ryan does.](https://act.myngp.com/el/StfwWksW8-irPj0HqP3fZg==/0eo-G_Bj9EVlb0D-k54eAg==?utm_campaign=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=km&refcode=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%FIRSTNAME%%&lastname=%%LASTNAME%%&city=%%CITY%%&state=%%STATE_ABBR%%&zip=%%ZIP%%&phone=%%HOMEPHONE%%&occupation=%%OCCUPATION%%&employer=%%EMPLOYER%%) **
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/StfwWksW8-irPj0HqP3fZg==/0eo-G_Bj9EVlb0D-k54eAg==?utm_campaign=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=km&refcode=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%FIRSTNAME%%&lastname=%%LASTNAME%%&city=%%CITY%%&state=%%STATE_ABBR%%&zip=%%ZIP%%&phone=%%HOMEPHONE%%&occupation=%%OCCUPATION%%&employer=%%EMPLOYER%%)
---

Hello --

Forget about rumors of Paul Ryan quitting or declining to run for re-election for just a moment. In fact, forget about Paul Ryan altogether.

Instead, remember that, at its core, this campaign has always been about fighting to give working people a seat at the table again. It's about electing someone to Congress who can represent us, because he is one of us. Randy isn't taking a cent from corporate PACs, fossil fuels or the gun lobby. His campaign is powered entirely by people like you.

**[So, it's on us to send a U.S. Army veteran, cancer survivor, public school parent, and union ironworker with one heck of a mustache to fight for working people in Congress. Chip in $3 or more right now and help Randy Bryce hit our $2 million end-of-quarter fundraising goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/StfwWksW8-irPj0HqP3fZg==/0eo-G_Bj9EVlb0D-k54eAg==?utm_campaign=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=km&refcode=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%FIRSTNAME%%&lastname=%%LASTNAME%%&city=%%CITY%%&state=%%STATE_ABBR%%&zip=%%ZIP%%&phone=%%HOMEPHONE%%&occupation=%%OCCUPATION%%&employer=%%EMPLOYER%%)**

Here's why we have to stay focused: regardless of whether Ryan is in or out, we're still in for a fight if we want to elect a working person to Congress. If Ryan's in, he already has $10 million in his account. And if Ryan doesn't run, there's still plenty of time for Trump and the Kochs to hand-pick a candidate.

Whatever happens, we need to keep building a truly grassroots campaign, one based on a broad coalition of Bernie Sanders and Hillary Clinton supporters, brothers and sisters in labor, women's organizations, veterans, students, progressive activists, and working people.

That's how we'll send Randy Bryce to Congress to protect Social Security, to make Medicare for All a reality, to bring back good jobs by rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure, to protect workers with strong unions, to stand with women and families with access to reproductive care and equal pay, and to protect our children from gun violence by taking on the NRA.

**[If you're a part of this campaign because you want to do more than just give Paul Ryan the boot, then we better make sure Randy Bryce wins this thing. Chip in $3 or more and help us hit our $2 million end-of-quarter fundraising goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/StfwWksW8-irPj0HqP3fZg==/0eo-G_Bj9EVlb0D-k54eAg==?utm_campaign=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=km&refcode=em18_180329_EOQ-km_fnd_gq_ful__BH&amount=25&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%FIRSTNAME%%&lastname=%%LASTNAME%%&city=%%CITY%%&state=%%STATE_ABBR%%&zip=%%ZIP%%&phone=%%HOMEPHONE%%&occupation=%%OCCUPATION%%&employer=%%EMPLOYER%%)**

Thank you,

Bill

clean_body: %% " 'Rumor mill' says Ryan headed for exit" \- The Hill, 03/26/18 The rumor-mill is always churning out something. But you know what's always true? Working people need a voice in their democracy -- and Randy Bryce is the ironworker who will fight for them in Congress. %% %% Hello -- Forget about rumors of Paul Ryan quitting or declining to run for re-election for just a moment. In fact, forget about Paul Ryan altogether. Instead, remember that, at its core, this campaign has always been about fighting to give working people a seat at the table again. It's about electing someone to Congress who can represent us, because he is one of us. Randy isn't taking a cent from corporate PACs, fossil fuels or the gun lobby. His campaign is powered entirely by people like you. %% Here's why we have to stay focused: regardless of whether Ryan is in or out, we're still in for a fight if we want to elect a working person to Congress. If Ryan's in, he already has $10 million in his account. And if Ryan doesn't run, there's still plenty of time for Trump and the Kochs to hand-pick a candidate. Whatever happens, we need to keep building a truly grassroots campaign, one based on a broad coalition of Bernie Sanders and Hillary Clinton supporters, brothers and sisters in labor, women's organizations, veterans, students, progressive activists, and working people. That's how we'll send Randy Bryce to Congress to protect Social Security, to make Medicare for All a reality, to bring back good jobs by rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure, to protect workers with strong unions, to stand with women and families with access to reproductive care and equal pay, and to protect our children from gun violence by taking on the NRA. %% Thank you, Bill Bill Hyers Chief Strategist Randy Bryce for Congress %% Paid for by Randy Bryce for Congress

name: 2020 Census Update | WolfForPa.com
subject: Trump wants to RIG the 2020 Census:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | [**New York Times: "The Trump Administration Sabotages the Census" **](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd133f/3785761273/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-2020-census?utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=1+-+New+York+Times+ldquoThe+Trump+Administra")

We have some bad news, Trump and Republicans are stooping to a new low: rigging the U.S. census to give them an advantage in maintaining control of government.

**Sign Urgently:[Stop Trump from rigging the 2020 Census ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd133e/3785761273/VEsE/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-2020-census?utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=2+-+Stop+Trump+from+rigging+the+2020+Censusn")**
* * *
Every 10 years, the U.S. Census is conducted to determine how congressional seats are apportioned and how state and federal dollars are distributed.

**_[And listen, Donald Trump wants to rig the census in his favor.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd133d/3785761273/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-2020-census?utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=3+-+And+FIRSTNAMElisten+Donald+Trump+wants+t")_**

He wants to add a new, untested question to the 2020 Census that would skew the census -- _it would suppress minority voters, fuel partisan gerrymandering, and hurt programs like Social Security and Medicare._

We can't let him get away with this attack. **Sign Immediately:[Stop Trump from rigging the 2020 Census ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd133c/3785761273/VEsC/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-2020-census?utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=4+-+Stop+Trump+from+rigging+the+2020+Censusn")** | [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd1323/3785761273/VEsD/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-2020-census?utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=5")
---
Republicans have tried every tool in the book to rig elections, from unfair, biased voter ID laws to extreme partisan gerrymandering.

Governor Wolf is fighting to make sure that our future elections are free, equal, and secure.

Governor Wolf knows the integrity of our elections is essential. In 2020 when new districts are drawn, Governor Wolf has the power to reject an unfair map.

That's why it's important to re-elect Governor Wolf -- and have a fair, accurate census in 2020.

**[So please, sign your name to stop Donald Trump from rigging the 2020 Census:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd1322/3785761273/VEsA/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-2020-census?utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=6+-+So+please+sign+your+name+to+stop+Donald+")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Trump-2020-Census](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd1321/3785761273/VEsB/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-2020-census?utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=7+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomTrump2020Census")**

Thanks for taking action,

_Wolf for PA_

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7a/73a2bc12/3f74cdc6/1fcd1320/3785761273/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__&source=em18_180329_census_clk_clq_act__")

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: the short version
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
As busy as I get, there's one thing I always remember, and that's who hired me to do this job. You. You hired me to fight for you in Washington, and that's what I do every day -- whether it's standin |
---

| | Peter,

Spoiler alert: **[I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my re-election campaign in this email.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa997b/4190480773/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180329.1nd&amount=10")** Now let me tell you why.

Between introducing bills, reviewing legislation, and meeting with constituents, my days are pretty full. And that's how I like it. I'm proud to be known as the hardest-working member of the Senate.

**But as busy as I get, there 's one thing I always remember, and that's who hired me to do this job. You.**

You hired me to fight for you in Washington, and that's what I do every day -- whether it's standing up to Mitch McConnell to protect affordable access to health care or protecting Social Security and Medicare.

But that hasn't exactly endeared me to special interests in Washington -- and they are powerful. They're spending big to replace me with someone who doesn't mind selling out Social Security or ripping away Hoosiers' health care. **The only way we can fight back is with the power of our grassroots community.**

**Peter, our campaign is so close to hitting _15,000 individual online supporters_. Will you help us hit that goal by pitching in before Saturday's big end-of-quarter deadline? Your gift will be matched.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa997a/4190480773/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.1nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa9975/4190480773/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.1nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa9974/4190480773/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.1nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa9977/4190480773/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.1nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa9976/4190480773/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180329.1nd")****
In 2012, most people didn't think I'd win Indiana's Senate seat. The odds were stacked against us, and so were the dollars. But with the support of folks like you, we were able to knock on thousands of doors, make even more calls, and spread our message from South Bend to Evansville.

This time is going to be even tougher. We're in a "toss-up" race -- some pundits even say Republicans have an edge -- and the Koch brothers have already spent $6 million against me. **I know that with a winning message, a strong field team,_and your support_ , we can win.**

**But we need to hit our goals, Peter.[Will you make a donation now to help us hit 15,000 donors by Saturday?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa997b/4190480773/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180329.1nd&amount=10") Don't forget, your gift will be matched.**

\-- Joe

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2383/7377f838/3197068a/51fa9971/4190480773/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180329.1nd&amount=25")**
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206

name: John Kasich
subject: We can do it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
Our country is facing many challenges these days and it's
critical that our leaders look for real opportunities to improve
the lives of all Americans.

Peter, we're nearing the end of
the month and that means we have another fundraising goal.

I've challenged our team to raise
$7,500 before April 1st to ensure that we have the funds to
continue spreading our message. Can I count on your support?

Our country is facing many
challenges these days and it's critical that our leaders look for
real opportunities to improve the lives of all Americans and
avoid the temptation to instead score cheap political wins that
cause the nation and our communities to be further divided.

Peter, we must continue to be
the voices of reason and to challenge every American to take it
upon themselves to lift our own communities from the bottom up.
We cannot wait for Washington to save the day!

It's not going to be easy, but I
intend to continue carrying this message and hope to have your
support. Together, we can heal America.

Thank you for all that you're
doing.

-John

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

Friend, we’re just 2 days away from the biggest test our campaign has faced.

It’s our first END OF QUARTER fundraising deadline of 2018, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching our goals.

We have $16,039 left to go.

[>> EMERGENCY CHIP IN $10 >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Os11u2YNgk9uo88__HFbmODbpZ60JBu5byIE-uPJGAkOZkegn8Lln4n-N8we_bOr0hQGRxOztiYk7RIzmKOAetq10LwQvmZZS-c_td7UHIs3lSUBKd5PmNIakYPugzJ3lVK7jzJGNDnF25KODrAsAcI8uPOW74RRCCeuPT1neNkKWoLGmxcLVML5wxONfzVBX2UqLS9B04Jz52Xt1nt-g_86k1l-8IO3R2mxBmCpxYSKRgsmmI4qsGFr8LfflcWpr0nQftsNFgeUqhha2xKIP386q8qqgBPmM_8BannVsIo3HsXUoiN4_pDJYYr94EKy0Tb3K9XTDhYiNs_PMLGlzm7xKKbmAm91u59ixn5lCD-8F3ODWiGWyUWUmEaPc0RNy1j2wkfsFezx82sJRjXvAm1U5SCtSm0KylVAbl0MfmY%3D)

As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of the Washington elite. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office.

But Friend, if our end-of-quarter numbers are big, the Washington establishment will not be able to ignore us.

If we work together, I'm positive we can reach our goal. To make it even easier, one generous donor has stepped up and agreed to match every donation we get before our END OF QUARTER deadline.

**That means a gift of $50, is really $100. If you give $100, it's really $200, and so on...**

Don't pass up the opportunity to chip in now!

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Os11u2YNgk9uo88__HFbmEoRtYcMpZVimwHK14gSYD9mGVPocr_YVT5i2OfBtaI4gyQSV8fLwiifafcCASFTBnojh2DEyEwCKhhCP42tevK8nc27KvGjT5uGFzL_c36FGpCcwZeDA-slzQCWC4eRGEfr0A9ThF_HEkICPKchnsVtXnTLoUXNIgvh07fZR_GIb-MJwc75fprMloOs1V-rRyH4HncD1OdVS3b_qpOqlokXt99uMJO4y1lyPXW_5yMRkeTqPA7t0MdduitUKjeLOONrsn2Vk3eECe4VKlBxHm3KPkvsWtnnnk0BB5Ebu5_b7oDSdU4P2nslEBb03Y16UvPAzSN_n5pNrJ3udGtvvRdJ9HLBElDBE2Nw09oxItrd) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Os11u2YNgk9uo88__HFbmEoRtYcMpZVimwHK14gSYD8IaWbCCdf5nTJYxkrYsakcbfTCUkIhrJL1Wx9g_9jDpI2KKkXQrbW0NwYJljoles4fyTuH997jo_ViTwWNLfJYPuqyMpOFo6aVWzPWopMhCcdKY8txax0IABRVU8f57o8zkmp-Kfj_fMpZFXeoZHxXJyDFFWaAvJqPHlEctZiVjVmjBH9lfREbaJXehyeWmukEmwlc4Y-Tb_WbhgEiO1qab58g4boxkMm8kiChAK-Gi3L5jlE7kD_bKcnKTxZXtUJKxhxf-evJ1GwXAHVX5Uoix43F_04majwhWGtnYPLm0hCnAGLe8Z4_d1MOjVuet9Vib8nFAfTLWeU9X46eJhha) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Os11u2YNgk9uo88__HFbmIBl5c9kpQVBB7pSND3G7kiN_3Ua4z4XBsKHmYzb9mnO_F88ivOvMdsO6zi_4_oqmguQOXC5U5XxS1vjRj7juSQEAEF5B74WYwx32Zss0Lu91V1T0Ju8GVr6lkPzOpD2rtZaDW47rPb1cOKSgGBs75nygc0v-iLlGMQCnSq_0JXXT1ckw69YQJvEaFCS1h-mBLNMgQlLBQsUX8nktPeIcSbLtLGz1Wge72sBLbdt0JRSHF91HHMmh0lRK_LokGK_yw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Os11u2YNgk9uo88__HFbmLjCbJKN10MjzF7RNsl8MsncbVk5aYmMYo26HrRcUtlCsFumGyE9pZwF8vLjYmql7UlH7j7Ej2zjIAdl5HNT4vxzaRX-oTKkdoWEIwz5vtYrRItbHe0SRdIgev3cgCkQJAbIqAuT7NPyB6DTjNBxSLRz1ckjKmEJxhHw8yr6IzSZENLjGG8Njxq3uZFeIdhJv4eST45hRsIPjVBG03LrPBpSM2sYj4xVFMXfvUuFIzPJwMfTg7agnlvDkj83EOswMw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Os11u2YNgk9uo88__HFbmHMdPZw-JJfUfCcy-9Oc2OFqplblyT3qCaNcAmhvMqVyYZTykP_hvmhYicWZ2E-OaTvsWlyQS7YXf-BaMkemhWrGwPm1uYMLIdKhs_FL82cgTX8lx0tnaDrJNzlIbA0xMzpLUp4xIgONnFfr6ZnRQxqcrXvPdaUIWlUuigh07JtZXHebSw6ya21pcnmSy8YoQjO_fiIrj9F1F6Vvk6fBVPnoMHsZbd4ii-cVZ65eeDAWKDJh0FCydeVCSWQsItTbsw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Os11u2YNgk9uo88__HFbmEoRtYcMpZVimwHK14gSYD_aKxr_MTpvc4SHJPIRtDfAfTVnMvFtAsph84F8Q6lrB1Y-0IgN2hDsNnS9MQwWnjXGzc5w5ntR_2Pi2zlJaMwbyZYwJaqpAYCgz063aG1bNtwq4Goo2mMnRXNIPUdutAm8H7YXCX7sbJT7wCZtup3hAxT-ERHqwBEMeASEFbyNCTgJwGjZqt_7oEufC-1NGF_HciCbyy8Mj3-T3p5uq4KErYp3GtkF_rTxVOIcJUAk8hW5pyloUctKdaXlcLXhuOKsGeYMMJsa-iekfi-IHAvQSoeCc1uxQbLUjctyC9Rkhp-Pg3kS4eVpZgeiNrpi15VzuEhJ1amkPPaUBcXKHOMnkDDk-3PzZURhP4Y6I59zUQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Z19kTsY909STortXlF2nnkAeysE8WvaR4H7yhsqYv0cwVVmKkDU5iWL1MhSAGyA5tbCLt0aoPzffpUgtSPJAQcmAy5imNnrtj_NKsAVxYGwhRP5otNtqw1JL_MxjiNrYqOVOT_ZtRnaWP2x-TAY9OQ17xa2WPYf4YM6RHhpTLytQeKexlVqXep8sklsFeZeMQqA-fNLLpcSPhyA_zksK-rHb6pEeMzNdIHaFfVV7UVb7jdrbcbmSERx-rSw9QFGo) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8b902e95965f43339f1ce9c89d0517dd&_e=Z19kTsY909STortXlF2nnkAeysE8WvaR4H7yhsqYv0cwVVmKkDU5iWL1MhSAGyA5tbCLt0aoPzffpUgtSPJAQcmAy5imNnrtj_NKsAVxYGwhRP5otNtqw1JL_MxjiNrYqOVOT_ZtRnaWP2x-TAY9OQ17xa2WPYf4YM6RHhpTLytQeKexlVqXep8sklsFeZeMQqA-fNLLpcSPhyA_zksK-rHb6pEeMzNdIHaFfVV7UVb7jdrbcbmSERx-rSw9QFGo) to unsubscribe. subject: we're expecting a Trump landing in Ohio

body:
|

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: the rumors are true
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VgfO6M6qolvOgt1ztBVm3-Gk60ugRCggocDsPWYbqs4=/KVc0cg_kZ-fJGBZ17YUFTuNcoTN9UUgAee95X_J5Ugc=)

Peter,

By now, you may have heard that the only Republican on the ballot in our district is a proud holocaust-denier and a rampant anti-Semite. He is our opponent in November.

Our situation is not unique. Trump and his allies on the fringe-right have emboldened the worst elements of our society and used them to push their agenda.

It's up to us here on the frontlines to **fight back**.

[**Midnight on Saturday is our first Federal Election Commission deadline of the election year and our first since clinching the Democratic primary. We need to refill our grassroots fund so we can have a blowout victory in November. Please, click here to contribute towards our ambitious goal of $15,000!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VgfO6M6qolvOgt1ztBVm3-Gk60ugRCggocDsPWYbqs4=/MWmezEwljMbsfeODxUiDGRv2qLzODNpfJV0ktZq9VZg=?recurring=auto&amount=10.00&refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180329_1_1&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Trump has given anti-Semites like Art Jones a platform and a sense of validation -- he's made them feel comfortable taking their beliefs public.

But in these midterms, Democrats are taking a stand and putting an end to Trumpism.

Voters here believe in America's values of inclusivity, diversity and respect for all. I've spent my career fighting for those values, but this year the stakes are higher than ever.

[**That 's why I'm going to keep fighting -- but I need your help to hit our goal before Saturday's FEC reporting deadline. Can you chip in $5, $10, or $25 now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VgfO6M6qolvOgt1ztBVm3-Gk60ugRCggocDsPWYbqs4=/MWmezEwljMbsfeODxUiDGRv2qLzODNpfJV0ktZq9VZg=?recurring=auto&amount=10.00&refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180329_1_1&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)

Thanks for taking a stand,

Dan Lipinski

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress

name: Lindsey Miller, Martin Heinrich for Senate
subject: Following up on Martin's email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Hi, I wanted to make sure you saw Martin's note from yesterday.

Republicans are intent on defeating Senate Democrats like Martin, and this FEC report is our biggest chance to prove that our grassroots supporters will stop them in their tracks.

[_**Will you answer Martin 's call to action and contribute before our first 2018 FEC deadline so that everyone who sees our report knows Martin's got what it takes to win? You can give here ->**_](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+answer+Martinrsquos+call+to+act&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")

\-- Lindsey

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

Friend -- In a little over 72 hours, we face the most important deadline of my campaign.

What's the deadline? Our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing of 2018, after which I will have to publicly report how much money my campaign has in the bank.

**This FEC report will be pored over by everyone -- the media, my opponents, and dark-money groups -- to gauge whether I have the strength to win my first re-election campaign in November.**

We need to **prove we have what it takes to go toe-to-toe** with my two right-wing opponents, which means we need to post our biggest numbers yet. That's why we've set a goal of 575 grassroots donations before our Saturday deadline.

[_**Will you help us break a fundraising record before we file our first FEC report for 2018? Click here to contribute $27 before our Saturday deadline and help prove Senate Democrats will win big this November.**_](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+help+us+break+a+fundraising+rec&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")** **[Donate $27 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?express_lane=true&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")** Why do we need 575 donations before midnight Saturday? Because 575 more donations would put us over the top and break our previous record for quarterly donations, and reporting numbers like that will prove I have the momentum to win in November.

**I am facing two extreme right-wing opponents, and the Koch brothers ' network has already set up shop here in New Mexico.** We can't afford to show any sign of weakness, especially in this first 2018 FEC report.

[_**So, will you contribute today to make sure I file my strongest FEC report yet? Every gift will prove our grassroots network can overcome whatever challenges are thrown our way.**_](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+FIRSTNAMESo+will+you+contribute+today+to&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")

Thank you for your support,
Martin

---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b8ee/43d8135f/624a98d7/51035122/3816321245/VEsO/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b8ee/43d8135f/624a98d7/51035125/3816321245/VEsP/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_1_2").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

body:
Team: The TRIPLE-MATCH makes right now your best opportunity to help take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the GOP -- but you have to act before the looming FEC quarterly deadline...
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
**HURRY, HURRY: ALL GRASSROOTS GIFTS TRIPLE-MATCHED!
[Don't miss your chance! Pitch in before the FEC deadline >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We're worried, team.

The GOP hasn't been sitting around licking their wounds after their special election losses, they've been DOUBLING-DOWN.

In fact, they are spending record amounts to take down Democratic Senators in Wisconsin, Missouri, and Ohio -- all states that Trump won in 2016.

**We need to raise $300,000 to fight back BEFORE the looming FEC deadline. Can we count on you to chip in? (your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED)**

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=5&refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=15&refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=25&refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?amount=35&refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The GOP is investing early because there's just so much at stake, team. They want to take down Obamacare and gut Social Security and Medicare as we know it.

And they know that if we can re-elect all of our Democratic Senators AND make sure our two challengers in "Toss Up" races win, we will take the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's grasp.

**With everything that 's at stake, can we count on you to chip in $1 to help us take back the Senate -- and hit this critical FEC deadline? (All gifts TRIPLE-MATCHED!)**

[**http://www.dscc.org/March-FEC-Deadline-Match**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab-18?refcode=DPE-20180329-TripleDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
We've accomplished so much together in the last year, from cutting taxes to slashing job-killing regulations to prioritizing our military, that it makes the Obama years feel like a distant memory.

_**But we can 't be fooled into thinking those times are behind us**_. Not with the Democrats doing everything in their power to take back the House and put an end to our conservative agenda.

If they do take back the House in the 2018 midterms, **they will reverse** every one of our wins and then block this administration at every opportunity.

**First, they will raise your taxes.**

**Then, they will reinstate crippling regulations.**
****
**
Finally, they will gut our military.**

[**We can 't let this happen.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDg4LWFhZTE5MjFhYTA4MTQxNWE4ZmE4ZDhjOTA4YWNhZWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgwMzI2XzA5MDUyNjk4Nw%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuc3BlYWtlcnJ5YW4uY29tLzIwMTgtbWFyY2gtZW9xLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwMzI5X1BhdWxSeWFuX0FFLUdPUDM&K=WJr5MG7CWrQiRzbdsEq2uA) Not when we've come so far to enact this sweeping conservative agenda that's helping people across the country every single day.

Now is our opportunity to come together and show the Democrats that we will fight for our values -- that we will unify against them and their big-government agenda.

This Saturday is the first FEC fundraising deadline of 2018. **And if we have a strong report, we will show the left that we are united and ready to protect the House.**

**[Protect the House -- donate $25](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDg4LWFhZTE5MjFhYTA4MTQxNWE4ZmE4ZDhjOTA4YWNhZWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgwMzI2XzA5MDU1MjYwNA%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuc3BlYWtlcnJ5YW4uY29tLzIwMTgtbWFyY2gtZW9xLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwMzI5X1BhdWxSeWFuX0FFLUdPUDM&K=DbehPabYqkLA4tR2MAeuqA)

[Protect the House -- donate $75](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MDg4LWFhZTE5MjFhYTA4MTQxNWE4ZmE4ZDhjOTA4YWNhZWIy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgwMzI2XzA5MDYyMjYwOA%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuc3BlYWtlcnJ5YW4uY29tLzIwMTgtbWFyY2gtZW9xLz9yZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9NzUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwMzI5X1BhdWxSeWFuX0FFLUdPUDM&K=2I7HccYNFl03-QJHzj9TAA)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: If you read one email today, I hope it's this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

I wanted to send you one more note as we close out this major fundraising month (the last one from me, at least - I'm sure my team will try and get a few more in your inbox before the clock strikes [midnight tomorrow...)](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0z%2FoMqdVj4YmSWT%2FnSeSiIKAu5NMiaqk)

**2018 is going to be about running good races.** With a more politically conscious electorate than ever before, it's going to be about running campaigns that are in touch, smart, engaging, and values-based. [So when my team and I reach out to ask for your support, whether it's a vote, a donation, or just asking you to talk to your neighbors, it's because we want this campaign to be powered by _YOU._](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=p4jYdi2a7x%2FoJyVrwANsyoKAu5NMiaqk)

I know you're getting a lot of emails lately, but I hope if there's anything you take away from this crazy time of year, it's that _you_ have the power to decide the outcomes on [November 6th](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tT2IuEXv%2Fp80G3Q4pp07oYKAu5NMiaqk) and that you are the backbone of campaigns like mine. _We can 't do any of this without your support._

[I'm still aiming for 10,000 contributions this quarter, from first time donors as well as frequent donors. I sure hope you're with me. Follow this link if you can help out today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=91vtpB%2F2x%2Bm6tFn4q8faVIKAu5NMiaqk)

Thanks,

_Tim_
---

subject: You can make a difference today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,

Card-carrying members of WVDP are on the frontlines of the fight for working families. Because of your support, West Virginia workers have won TWICE. Our teachers and school service personnel secured a 5% pay raise for all state employees and our brothers and sisters of CWA won their battle with Frontier to keep over 200 middle-class jobs in West Virginia. We were right there, fighting alongside them and [we can't let up now](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pt3dTyUf7lEvHxnI8LsOi0SVIbcfvP_MuVmdiD3ethc=/N9OquQfC8GKh8ZciMDtnm-1Md_TzzJixmb0rsoY1fUw=?refcode=March18).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: What's ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Help me keep the momentum going. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79d25/2f5ea88d/72ec4654/2cbc86b2/1703460126/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freeze-eoq?utm_source=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&refcode=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&utm_campaign=eoq-3-control&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'm proud of the significant progress we made in the legislative session. Washingtonians are better off because we put our heads down, worked hard, and focused on doing what's right for hard-working families. But the gavel was barely down to end the legislative session and Republicans were on the attack. They can't stand the thought that we're leading the nation in passing strong, progressive legislation. They're furious that I stood up to Trump, right to his face, to oppose his disastrous proposal to arm our teachers. And ultimately, it makes them furious that, while Donald Trump is talking and tweeting, in Washington we're taking action and putting big progressive wins on the board. [**We can't let Republicans seize control of the conversation, diverting attention from real issues. Will you help me keep fighting for hard-working Washingtonians?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79d25/2f5ea88d/72ec4654/2cbc86b2/1703460126/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freeze-eoq?utm_source=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&refcode=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&utm_campaign=eoq-3-control&utm_medium=ema") In Washington and across the country, people are standing up to the harsh agenda pushed by President Trump and his Republican allies. Democratic victories in nearly 40 special elections nationwide -- most of them won against overwhelming odds -- make it clear Republicans are on the defensive. That's why I'm working hard to elect Democratic governors across the nation this year. [**As Republicans rack up failure after failure, it's critical we communicate to voters our progressive victories and vision -- we must give people a reason to vote for us, not just against Trump. Can you make a donation today to help? We need to raise $20,000 before midnight on Saturday.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79d25/2f5ea88d/72ec4654/2cbc86b2/1703460126/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freeze-eoq?utm_source=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&refcode=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&utm_campaign=eoq-3-control&utm_medium=ema") Thank you for standing with me at this pivotal moment. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79d25/2f5ea88d/72ec4654/2cbc86b2/1703460126/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freeze-eoq?utm_source=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&refcode=ema_2018-03-29_eoq-3-control&utm_campaign=eoq-3-control&utm_medium=ema")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Your State Convention Keynote Speaker Is...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
I have big news to share. We're planning a fantastic 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention for you this year in Evansville, and we just secured... | | | [View this email in your browser](http://mailchi.mp/indiana/your-state-convention-keynote-speaker-is?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| | #INGOP18
**RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel to Keynote 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention**
---
| Friends -

I have big news to share. We're planning a fantastic [2018 Indiana Republican State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f8ec6831c8&e=1acd9bb3d6) for you this year in Evansville, and we just secured a convention speaker that you'll definitely want to hear.

**I'm excited to announce that Ronna McDaniel, chairwoman of the Republican National Committee (RNC), will present the keynote address at our state convention on Saturday, June 9!**

You've probably seen Chairwoman McDaniel on TV, delivering the Republican perspective countless times on cable news, but you probably don't know the story behind the woman who's helping lead our national party to [record fundraising](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bf03092c5e&e=1acd9bb3d6) and the [strongest data network and ground game](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2feaabd923&e=1acd9bb3d6) we've ever possessed (and that's already at work here in Indiana).

Chairwoman McDaniel has a personal story much like many of us. A Midwest native, she began her career in politics as a grassroots activist in Michigan, serving as a precinct delegate, a district committee executive member, a state party committeewoman, and an RNC committeewoman. With hard work, she rose through the ranks to become the chair of the Michigan Republican Party, where in 2016 she helped deliver her home state for now-President Donald J. Trump and the Republican Party for the first time since 1988. And in 2017, she became the second ever woman to serve as chair of the RNC.

She's a mom and a Washington outsider, and in June, she's going to tell us about the RNC's plan to make sure President Trump has the majorities he needs in Congress to keep delivering results to the American people.
* **If you're already set to be a delegate to this year's convention, now's the time to make sure you've[paid your delegate fees](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7463270cc7&e=1acd9bb3d6). **
* **If you're not yet registered to be a delegate,[contact your county party chair today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8af99cabab&e=1acd9bb3d6), and inquire if there are still spots available to be appointed as a delegate. **
* **Or, if you'd prefer, you (and your family and friends) can also [register as convention guests](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fcdc73b5d2&e=1acd9bb3d6). **

You're not going to want to miss Chairwoman McDaniel's speech and everything we have planned for you at convention. From our top Indiana elected officials to great speakers to live music, the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention is going to be one for the record books. So make sure you're there, either as a delegate or a guest.

See you in Evansville.

-Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b3158ae57b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=59150cb4e9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c6de095233&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---

Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party

**Our mailing address is:**
Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc.101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200Indianapolis, IN 46204
[Add us to your address book](//indgop.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=3da08391f3).

name: Rand Paul
subject: Second amendment repealed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by RANDPAC not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
# **As former Clinton Crony and Chicago mayor Rahm Emanuel famously said “never let a crisis go to waste.”**
---
|
---
| | | **** The left came out of nowhere to attack our second amendment rights after the tragedy at Parkland High School last month, and I’m afraid they’re more serious than ever. I think we should do everything we can to make sure criminals and other known violent or mentally unstable people don’t acquire weapons. We have laws for that now, and there are ways to strengthen them. **But the attacks from the gun grabbing left aren’t about that. They’ve tried to deny it for years, but they want a whole laundry list of things the American people oppose:**
* **A ban on semiautomatic rifles that they don’t like the look of.**
* **To raise the age at which people can purchase a gun. We send people to war and allow them to vote at 18, but the left wants to disarm a young person who might need to defend themselves or their family**
* **Registration of all firearms with the federal government.**

But worst of all — they’ve now come out of the close and many are calling for a complete repeal of the 2nd Amendment! **I won’t stand idly by, and I hope you won’t either.**
---
| [Add Your Name](http://randpac.trk.klaviyomail.com/wf/click?upn=afOBAOxt0MtecrcI0tMRjcFNKG93H85vxxmlXRsI2FMs-2FW6RuO9dowYxQn2hsHL-2FZRoJWMGReiixvVR0KnyGItsNlIfcIqMBkAg-2BGhcI8XqpsTm9sovG2tPL1n9eQAi1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2Fim-2F-2Bcd6FDv3-2B9iJWy5034K-2FBiKG9-2F30ieuU-2F6z0WVOrwilEBHl-2BFdkb-2FvHOPhq2ef0-2FEsfc8-2BHoq0Sz1MUvCnLbWxRW4ZwuudlWUSrW-2Foj2VKQa52uSgsjgZBMEAxTRRhUlHUZgH-2BMgYss2H-2FLJ54XlxhI9llZ1DheXHKVRN88PULDafWebM9G0xewdvw2w1oz9si1vSukVW725bSSO5McYKQLPbgQdI9-2BVHUOFx3yHyrc4rGqO-2FZhh6AAwtUrt3O8-2FQrj-2Fe4uJR5-2BnGft5f9d3ZlaW-2FUDDUF7rX-2FJiJE4s-3D)
---
| **** It would be foolish to think they could never win this battle. We must join the fight, and you can do that today by helping me and RANDPAC shine a spotlight on their attempts to gut our Bill Rights. **The Second Amendment protects the 1 st and the 4th. We are not free without it. I won’t stand for it being attacked by lunatics on the left who don’t understand our constitution.** Just a small sample of those who are calling for REPEAL. ****
---
|
---
| ******That’s right, a recently retired SUPREME COURT JUDGE is leading the assault on the 2nd.** So my colleagues must hear from you, those who believe in freedom and the 2nd Amendment — will you make sure they do by adding your support here: [**Add Your Name**](http://randpac.trk.klaviyomail.com/wf/click?upn=afOBAOxt0MtecrcI0tMRjcFNKG93H85vxxmlXRsI2FMs-2FW6RuO9dowYxQn2hsHL-2FZRoJWMGReiixvVR0KnyGItsNlIfcIqMBkAg-2BGhcI8XqpsTm9sovG2tPL1n9eQAi1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2Fim-2F-2Bcd6FDv3-2B9iJWy5034K-2FBiKG9-2F30ieuU-2F6z0WVOrwilEBHl-2BFdkb-2FvHOPhq2ef0-2FEsfc8-2BHoq0Sz1MUvCnLbWxRW4ZwuudlWUSrW-2Foj2VKQa52uSgsjgZBMEAxTRRCR0P4HeQaHdC5CK1yPNdnaJkuuFW2wgtIz-2BLM6UfRmAndXX6-2FIb20adDlNQI-2FFsZdR9tRrSu16Z2aLGoirCXrWCuVCkN5Z3wNqn8KBcfRnJD3GA8qVScxH3jVPd16ztLZNTLnVe-2BipjdZEX8IczIORRn3YH-2Bay6YUnscgE9Svi4-3D) RANPAC will contact millions more people in defense of the 2nd Amendment. And even more importantly, we will help pro 2nd amendment candidates around the country this year. **EVERY CANDIDATE RANDPAC ENDORSES MUST PLEDGE THEIR 2 ND AMENDMENT SUPPORT.** Of course, it is more than that. I’m looking for leaders. People like [Nick Freitas](http://randpac.trk.klaviyomail.com/wf/click?upn=afOBAOxt0MtecrcI0tMRjbuV0RPyjDHOUs9f9kOn7B1EdFZY7REUor3CJgz9lsNdYaqkVnax0Yksoj7pBScmPZbKNcY2IkshyBF5J7w-2FfEM-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2Fim-2F-2Bcd6FDv3-2B9iJWy5034K-2FBiKG9-2F30ieuU-2F6z0WVOrwilEBHl-2BFdkb-2FvHOPhq2ef0-2FEsfc8-2BHoq0Sz1MUvCnLbWxRW4ZwuudlWUSrW-2Foj2VKQa52uSgsjgZBMEAxTRR3A-2BVJTiUA1Nz-2BdvtCyvius8weIWyTaUHTyfR7wAw0Pcb5Ucn7y75vqnLBI2GsG9EixYwmuq-2FV3cF0O1AaTo1hTfkzutEvbNn1yQFvKNqPk4XIXrdgVjAltqq0flJpaePfzgPb4TDQAMOfqEP-2Fc8ti-2BM5zKJHQqDVRxQ5AL0-2BOQ0-3D) in Virginia, who you may have seen give an impassioned defense of the 2nd Amendment that went viral to 30 million viewers. [Candidates](http://randpac.trk.klaviyomail.com/wf/click?upn=afOBAOxt0MtecrcI0tMRjbuV0RPyjDHOUs9f9kOn7B1EdFZY7REUor3CJgz9lsNdYaqkVnax0Yksoj7pBScmPZbKNcY2IkshyBF5J7w-2FfEM-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2Fim-2F-2Bcd6FDv3-2B9iJWy5034K-2FBiKG9-2F30ieuU-2F6z0WVOrwilEBHl-2BFdkb-2FvHOPhq2ef0-2FEsfc8-2BHoq0Sz1MUvCnLbWxRW4ZwuudlWUSrW-2Foj2VKQa52uSgsjgZBMEAxTRR0uKLch25e-2BXM22wN9cZTjwCZ6hNXCOXUXqjim94Yp3ky8MTSfXnIJxwHKCtV4jXV6qrOyHrn3z7WKo7o9UlJF77SQ-2Fbr5y5PGnZJXMbJE-2B47j0KU-2Beu2QB9dPVgig5YA8m7u6ANggL49MX0zJvFivqmg0yTa7pNRczLl6rKlGU8-3D) like Mike Gibbons and Matt Rosendale, Eric Brakey and Kelli Ward — they’re all staunch defenders of your right to keep and bear arms — and they’re all endorsed and funded by RANDPAC. So please [help today](http://randpac.trk.klaviyomail.com/wf/click?upn=DKsewz3VES3gPSHXDn-2BPB9vTbqltT8pxkfTAzDRGhS2Py-2F9CdLV7XjMDcRm-2BP3n4a6ZM6rfDcSAwx189cApXa0GaNIwlRdynJcJRW1LKXvoWH5ONN8hAFt4ffgmES85p_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2Fim-2F-2Bcd6FDv3-2B9iJWy5034K-2FBiKG9-2F30ieuU-2F6z0WVOrwilEBHl-2BFdkb-2FvHOPhq2ef0-2FEsfc8-2BHoq0Sz1MUvCnLbWxRW4ZwuudlWUSrW-2Foj2VKQa52uSgsjgZBMEAxTRRiClQcMBKyY-2Bo3AAUNd19EkZp6IQduvgLH9T8bs5FcgKSf2-2BiAHRqCcHeKZUTwpQ31zqIHtht2HBiEug4iDPhk6caKNKIPHcatRX0jgOn7X-2FDUVpW9QLTEzhtY-2B-2FUOefHXvsBIhtPTKzgkL0Dq2iSkRzqI9UE5eVevDcT-2FPtJRxc-3D).
