clean_body: | | | | | | | | | As former Clinton Crony and Chicago mayor Rahm Emanuel famously said “never let a crisis go to waste.” | | | | ** The left came out of nowhere to attack our second amendment rights after the tragedy at Parkland High School last month, and I’m afraid they’re more serious than ever. I think we should do everything we can to make sure criminals and other known violent or mentally unstable people don’t acquire weapons. We have laws for that now, and there are ways to strengthen them. But the attacks from the gun grabbing left aren’t about that. They’ve tried to deny it for years, but they want a whole laundry list of things the American people oppose: A ban on semiautomatic rifles that they don’t like the look of. To raise the age at which people can purchase a gun. We send people to war and allow them to vote at 18, but the left wants to disarm a young person who might need to defend themselves or their family Registration of all firearms with the federal government. But worst of all — they’ve now come out of the close and many are calling for a complete repeal of the 2nd Amendment! I won’t stand idly by, and I hope you won’t either. | | ** It would be foolish to think they could never win this battle. We must join the fight, and you can do that today by helping me and RANDPAC shine a spotlight on their attempts to gut our Bill Rights. The Second Amendment protects the 1 st and the 4th. We are not free without it. I won’t stand for it being attacked by lunatics on the left who don’t understand our constitution. Just a small sample of those who are calling for REPEAL. | | **That’s right, a recently retired SUPREME COURT JUDGE is leading the assault on the 2nd. So my colleagues must hear from you, those who believe in freedom and the 2nd Amendment — will you make sure they do by adding your support here: RANPAC will contact millions more people in defense of the 2nd Amendment. And even more importantly, we will help pro 2nd amendment candidates around the country this year. EVERY CANDIDATE RANDPAC ENDORSES MUST PLEDGE THEIR 2 ND AMENDMENT SUPPORT. Of course, it is more than that. I’m looking for leaders. People like in Virginia, who you may have seen give an impassioned defense of the 2nd Amendment that went viral to 30 million viewers. like Mike Gibbons and Matt Rosendale, Eric Brakey and Kelli Ward — they’re all staunch defenders of your right to keep and bear arms — and they’re all endorsed and funded by RANDPAC. So please . First: Sign your name on our Second; Either after you sign or right now, to help to DEFEND the Second Amendment today Thank you for all you do, Rand Paul, MD **** | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by RANDPAC not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee | RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I cannot do it without your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
The 2018 midterm elections will be a pivotal moment in American history. If we are successful we will be able to put an end to the disastrous Trump agenda, rebuild the declining middle class and create a Congress which stands for economic, political, racial and environmental justice.
In 2018 we have the _potential_ to not only make great electoral gains at all levels of government, but to elect strong progressives who are prepared to take on the 1 percent and fight for an agenda that meets the needs of working families, and not just the Koch brothers and other wealthy campaign contributors.
But these victories are far from guaranteed. It is just not enough for the American people to have something to vote _against_ , they must have something to vote _for._ Voters knew the myriad of problems with Donald Trump in 2016, and they still elected him. Today, despite all of his scandals and outrageous behavior, his approval ratings are close to the same levels as they were back then.
The truth is that, for a wide variety of reasons, millions of our fellow citizens have lost faith in government, hold political leaders in contempt and don't see any reason for voting. In the last midterm election, in 2014, the United States had the lowest voter turnout in 70 years - just 37 percent.
Our job in 2018 is to change all of that. Yes, we must take on Trump's authoritarianism, xenophobia, racism, sexism, homophobia and religious bigotry - but we must do more than that. We must rally the American people around an agenda that works for them, not the billionaire class. We must significantly increase voter turnout with strong, progressive candidates who are fighting for working families.
In my view, the 2018 elections present an historic opportunity to elect a new generation of candidates who will usher in an era of strong progressive change in this country. There are more candidates than ever before who support Medicare for all, free tuition at public colleges and universities, overturning Citizens United, a $15 minimum wage, common sense gun safety legislation, the transformation of our energy system away from fossil fuel and, in fact, our entire progressive agenda.
It's imperative that we support as many of these candidates as we possibly can. Because not only is that how we energize the working families of this country to come out and vote for Democrats, but it is how we can transform America.
You should know that I intend to be actively campaigning throughout this election season to energize the progressive community and support candidates who will stand by our agenda. And, by the way, that does not mean just "blue states." It means "red states" and "purple states" and states that Trump won by big margins. I look forward to seeing many of you at events from coast to coast. The bottom line is that the Democratic Party cannot continue to ignore half the states in the country. It must become a 50-state party.
But I cannot do it alone.
**[Please make a $3 donation to support my work traveling the country and rallying people to support progressive causes and candidates who need our help. I would not ask if it were not so important. I cannot do it without your help.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/opportunity-2018?refcode=em180329-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/opportunity-2018?refcode=em180329-t1-full")**
As you well remember, it was not long ago that many of the ideas we've long talked about were considered "fringe" by many in the corporate media and in Congress. Well, that's changing.
Several years ago, I introduced legislation calling for a Medicare-for-all, single-payer system. It had no co-sponsors. Too radical. Now, with a majority of Americans supporting Medicare for all, we have 16 co-sponsors. A few years ago, the idea of a $15 an hour national minimum wage seemed unthinkable. Now, we have 30 co-sponsors on our legislation. We are also seeing good progress in making public colleges and universities tuition-free, lowering the outrageous level of student debt, making child care more affordable and decriminalizing the possession of marijuana.
We have come a very long way in a short amount of time, and all of those gains are a testament to people of all backgrounds and in all communities coming together and standing up to say ENOUGH is ENOUGH! We want a government that works for all of us, and not just a handful of billionaires.
That is the political revolution.
In 2018, we can advance our cause dramatically. But it will not be easy. The financial elite and those who profit mightily from the status quo will not go down without a fight. They have obscene amounts of wealth and have used that money to protect a dysfunctional system that allows them to make billions in profits while leaving far too many Americans behind.
But if we are willing to fight for it, the time is right for our movement to make dramatic gains this year. That is what I intend to do, but I cannot do it alone:
**[Please make a $3 donation to support my work traveling the country and rallying people to support progressive causes and candidates who need our help. I would not ask if it were not so important. I cannot do it without your help.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/opportunity-2018?refcode=em180329-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/opportunity-2018?refcode=em180329-t1-full")**
Now IS the time for millions of working families to come together, to revitalize American democracy, to end the collapse of the American middle class, and to make certain that our children and grandchildren are able to enjoy a quality of life that brings them health, prosperity, security, and joy -- and that once again makes the United States the leader in the world in the fight for economic and social justice, for environmental sanity, and for a world of peace.
This year, we will advance our cause further than ever before. But that will only happen if we are in this fight together.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

****[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/opportunity-2018?refcode=em180329-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/opportunity-2018?refcode=em180329-t1-full")****
** **
** **
** **
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Peter
subject: What would you cut?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
You get a lot of emails from us. But we aren't sending them for our health. We're sending them because we've got a really tough race on our hands -- websites like Politico have called Joe the most vul |
---

| | Peter --

You get a lot of emails from us. But we aren't sending them for our health. We're sending them because we've got a really tough race on our hands -- websites like _Politico_ have called Joe the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the country.

We're sending them because if we fail to hit our goals, we have to start cutting pieces of our campaign plan. And cutting pieces could mean falling short in November.

This is already an incredibly frugal campaign, but the race for Indiana's Senate seat is going to be one of the most expensive in the country. If we want to win, _we can 't afford to cut anything_ \-- not from our voter contact program or our ad budget, not the offices we'll be rolling out across the state or our staff and organizers on the ground.

That's why I'm reaching out now. With your help, we can reach our goal of 15,000 donors and fund our fight the right way. **Will you pitch in today to help us reach our March 31st goal before the deadline and keep our campaign running full steam ahead?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238e/7377f838/3190ec82/51fa9773/22478285/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.2nd&amount=10")**

**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238e/7377f838/3190ec82/51fa976c/22478285/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.2nd&amount=100")**

We're sending them because we've got a really tough race on our hands -- websites like Politico have called Joe the most vul | | | Peter -- You get a lot of emails from us. But we aren't sending them for our health. We're sending them because we've got a really tough race on our hands -- websites like Politico have called Joe the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the country. We're sending them because if we fail to hit our goals, we have to start cutting pieces of our campaign plan. And cutting pieces could mean falling short in November. This is already an incredibly frugal campaign, but the race for Indiana's Senate seat is going to be one of the most expensive in the country. If we want to win, we can 't afford to cut anything \-- not from our voter contact program or our ad budget, not the offices we'll be rolling out across the state or our staff and organizers on the ground. That's why I'm reaching out now. With your help, we can reach our goal of 15,000 donors and fund our fight the right way. name: NHGOP Press & Communications
subject: Forrester Statement on Democrats Discussing the Repeal of the Second Amendment
body:
Liberals will take away your Second Amendment rights if they win in November.

**Forrester Statement on Democrats Discussing the Repeal of the Second Amendment**
For Immediate Release: March 29, 2018Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
Concord - NHGOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement after NH Democrat State Representative Kathy Rogers bringing up a repeal of the Second Amendment:
“New Hampshire Democrats are now openly discussing the possibility of repealing the Second Amendment, while Republicans are committed to defending it. Where do Jeanne Shaheen, Maggie Hassan, Annie Kuster, and the liberals running in the first congressional district stand on this issue?”
###

**BACKGROUND:**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Right now, we need one thing: grassroots support. **Our average online contribution is twenty-six dollars.** I know it doesn't sound like much. Millionaires and billionaires can write six and seven figure checks at the drop of a hat. But we have something they don't. We have strength in numbers. When we all come together and give just a little bit, we're more powerful than special interest groups. [**_Our first big test is in 2 days. It 's our first FEC deadline of the election year, and we can't afford to miss our goal. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: what's at stake in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Last Saturday, I was proud to march with incredible student leaders from Maryland and around the country to demand real action to save lives by passing common sense gun laws.

Now that the March for Our Lives is over, the NRA and the gun lobby are counting on us to give up and go away. But we are not going to do that. We must show them that we are in this fight until Congress takes meaningful action to end the carnage and reduce the daily toll of gun violence in our country.

The political math is simple -- to pass life-saving national legislation, we need to have the votes. And to get the votes, we need to win elections. That means winning big Senate races in states like Florida and Nevada and elsewhere where Republican Senate candidates have A+ ratings from the NRA, while Democratic Senate candidates support common-sense measures like a universal background check and a ban on military-style assault rifles.

[**I hope you will stand with me in this critical fight to help Senate Democratic candidates win this November so we can make progress on this and many other issues. Please donate now, before the first Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline of 2018 on Saturday, to help me ensure we have the resources to stand up to attacks from the NRA and win key Senate elections in November >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91847/70cdc2ba/460efc16/39037fc/1899689549/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fecsenatedeadline?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+I+hope+you+will+stand+with+me+in+this+cr&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1")

The terrible toll of gun violence has been taking lives in Maryland and around the country for way too long. No state or family is immune. Despite our strong gun laws here in Maryland, 62 percent of the guns used in crime in Baltimore come from states with looser laws. Prayers are not enough. Focused political efforts are necessary.

[**The first FEC deadline of the 2018 midterms is on Saturday, and we need your help now to win these campaigns.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91847/70cdc2ba/460efc16/39037fd/1899689549/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fecsenatedeadline?refcode=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+The+first+FEC+deadline+of+the+2018+midte&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1")

In recent months we have all been moved by the enthusiasm and activism of young people who have mobilized and organized to make our country a better and safer place. Since the election of Donald Trump, people of all ages here in our state and across the country have stepped up to make their voices heard and to make a difference.

I am proud to work with each of you and to represent Maryland at this critical moment. Working together I know we can get this job done.

Thank you for all that you do!

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord Street, Suite 202
Kensington, MD 20895

Thank you for standing with Chris!

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91847/70cdc2ba/460efc16/39037fa/1899689549/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list. To support Chris, send a check to the address above, or [**click here.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91847/70cdc2ba/460efc16/39037fb/1899689549/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-footer?amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+click+here&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180329_1_1")

Americans for Prosperity -- the Koch brothers' organization -- are singling Bob Casey out for his vote against a $1.5 trillion-dollar tax cut that mostly benefits corporations and the 1%. They're pledging to spend $20 million this year to defeat Democrats -- including Bob -- who voted against the GOP's corporate giveaways.

_This changes everything, team._ Bob needs a bigger ad budget so he can address these smears head on, and the deadline is coming up fast.

It's not just the Koch brothers that we're worried about. The Republican National Committee has already knocked on hundreds of thousands of doors in Pennsylvania to attack Bob's record, and earlier this month, President Trump promised that he'll be campaigning "very, very hard" for the extremist Republican trying to flip this seat.

**Republicans want to turn Pennsylvania red again in November, so we need to start fighting back _now_.** Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to support Bob Casey?

body:
We aren't done yet.
---
Hey friend --

This deadline is really important so we wanted to make sure you saw this message from Roy.

This end-of-month deadline is the biggest of the year so far and we can't afford to fall short on our goals.

**[Let Roy know you're in -- chip in TODAY before the deadline!](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203425/2fde7c66/47cf8d35/1569d123/2992766902/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-mar18eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180329_mareoq3_fnd_gq_ful__tc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em18_180329_mareoq3_fnd_gq_ful__tc&utm_content=1+-+Let+Roy+know+youre+in++chip+in+TODAY+bef")**

Hello,

Our win in the 2016 election was one for the history books. It was the closest gubernatorial election in North Carolina history. It was also the first time in our state's history an incumbent governor lost re-election.

It was a huge win -- and it wouldn't have been possible without you. We wouldn't have had a chance without our grassroots supporters.

But we aren't done yet.

**That's why I'm asking you for your help now. We still have to raise $15,000 before the end of this month. We've accomplished a lot during my first year.

We announced thousands of jobs -- the most announced in any one year for the last decade.

We pushed for a new raise for teachers and laid out the vision for making North Carolina a top 10 best educated state by 2025. We repealed HB2 and signed a non-discrimination order, working to remove that stain from North Carolina's reputation.

But there is more to do. And every week that passes, I'm reminded that our state needs a legislature that is more willing to work with me for the benefit of North Carolina families -- not their own ideology.

[**Chip in today before the deadline to help us Break the Majority.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203425/2fde7c66/47cf8d35/1569d139/2992766902/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-mar18eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180329_mareoq3_fnd_gq_ful__tc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em18_180329_mareoq3_fnd_gq_ful__tc&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+today+before+the+deadline+to+hel")
Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina,

Roy

name: Greg
subject: before the Easter weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
I’m blown away by your support these last few days. I just finished my last campaign event earlier today and am now back at home in Columbus with... | | |
---|---|---
|
---
I’m blown away by your support these last few days.

I just finished my last campaign event earlier today and am now back at home in Columbus with my family for the Easter Holiday, but I’ve got some exciting news to share.

First of all, I want to send a quick note to thank all of the Hoosiers who have stepped up because they believe in our message.

I’m humbled by your confidence and support.

Second of all, we are really close to hitting our March End of Quarter Fundraising Goal.

We only need $3,782 more to hit our $25,000 goal and demonstrate that our conservative, pro-Trump agenda is exactly what Sixth District Hoosiers want.

I know I can count on my fellow Hoosiers. Will you make this last push to hit our goal before midnight on March 31st?

My finance team created a safe and secure link to donate: **[https://secure.gregpenceforcongress.com/action-269088/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=0a60040592fe4e59bf62e16e891dd28b&_e=2nV3buHlf-hIQJdwr-GsclsMlqlN6nEa_kszfQpPxTFul88FutAzDyeQYAWSMnJNyvuW5r32AfFKhQvkl20tujGJNwTqE71LgIAYMdKa0V5G14MeV19zNJwvmRPo90hLlyo9Aoje-a_GFwU-1rUubI1Jvz0YuSGxyeVlHmBaAjAKy9mtE4g9mw3n0RC7w0z6ZrYBuLQbo1Mgdp0hiO4edw5Lq3Prj7wFLaIWOniHYfRZElizQgVehHCB4U7NX8xLdNn_JtBdvCH-UnDWn_HPrkoVcKBKgRnK02hIKnIxgHxf7p_e9Lw7QxR8YHmHlHTWPQnGdbHTB0Dgd01-32ITdmC12HICcdt-uUZESAM_DZ16v-ACqI-6XbiRidImk8se-nwWjAlnPH1gxnXwr2DAmpp4gcYKwhtgXpYxW5VaxX0%3D)**

I’m Ready to Serve, Again!
Greg

P.S. Wishing you and your family a blessed Easter!
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Did you see my note, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
2018 is a critical year for Democrats -- and Saturday at midnight is an important FEC fundraising deadline.
---
Did you get a chance to read my note earlier, Derek?

2018 is a critical year for Democrats -- and Saturday at midnight is an important FEC fundraising deadline. Winning in November starts right now, so I am asking for your support today.

**Contribute $3 before Saturday's deadline to elect Democrats in all 50 states this year.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca483/2368715365/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca480/2368715365/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca481/2368715365/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca48e/2368715365/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca48f/2368715365/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca48c/2368715365/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-kh-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
** Thanks for all you do,

Kamala

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Sender: Kamala Harris
Sent: Thur, Mar 29, 2018
Subject: This deadline really is important

I truly believe that 2018 will be the most important election we've had in my lifetime.

We are at a critical point in our nation's history -- this election isn't just about our children's future, it's about the future of our democracy.

This moment requires each and every one of us to be engaged. If we want to take back control of Congress this year, we must seize every moment between now and November as an opportunity to organize.

**If you're ready to bring the fight to the Republican Party this year, make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before Saturday's important fundraising deadline.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4a5/2368715365/VEsDAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=55+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4a2/2368715365/VEsDAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=56+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4a3/2368715365/VEsDAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=57+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4a0/2368715365/VEsDDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=58+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4a1/2368715365/VEsDDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/march-deadline-kh-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=59+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4ae/2368715365/VEsABQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-kh-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=60+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")
** I don't know about you, but I was so glad to put 2017 in the rearview mirror -- the only path to victory in November is to remain focused on the road in front of us, not on the fights behind us.

Let's remember what Dolores Huerta once said, "Every moment is an organizing opportunity, every person a potential activist, every minute a chance to change the world."

We can't afford to waste even a second. Every moment between now and November is critical to helping Democrats win -- and right now I am counting on you to step up before Saturday's important deadline.

**[Contribute $3 and make your first donation of 2018 before Saturday's FEC fundraising deadline. Together we will ensure that Democrats across the country have the resources they need to organize and win.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4af/2368715365/VEsABA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/march-deadline-kh-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=61+-+Contribute++if+consinConsGroup28497++set&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator, California

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4ac/2368715365/VEsABw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=62+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4ad/2368715365/VEsABg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=63+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4aa/2368715365/VEsAAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=64+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522404/4067b0a/528e10524/7e4ca4ab/2368715365/VEsAAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=65+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&source=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b&refcode=em_20180329_kh2_nd_b"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: 2018 is a critical year for Democrats -- and Saturday at midnight is an important FEC fundraising deadline. Did you get a chance to read my note earlier, Derek? 2018 is a critical year for Democrats -- and Saturday at midnight is an important FEC fundraising deadline. Winning in November starts right now, so I am asking for your support today. Contribute $3 before Saturday's deadline to elect Democrats in all 50 states this year. "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks for all you do, Kamala \---------- Forwarded message ---------- Sender: Kamala Harris Sent: Thur, Mar 29, 2018 Subject: This deadline really is important I truly believe that 2018 will be the most important election we've had in my lifetime. We are at a critical point in our nation's history -- this election isn't just about our children's future, it's about the future of our democracy. This moment requires each and every one of us to be engaged. If we want to take back control of Congress this year, we must seize every moment between now and November as an opportunity to organize. If you're ready to bring the fight to the Republican Party this year, make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before Saturday's important fundraising deadline. "" "" "" "" "" "" I don't know about you, but I was so glad to put 2017 in the rearview mirror -- the only path to victory in November is to remain focused on the road in front of us, not on the fights behind us. Let's remember what Dolores Huerta once said, "Every moment is an organizing opportunity, every person a potential activist, every minute a chance to change the world." We can't afford to waste even a second. Every moment between now and November is critical to helping Democrats win -- and right now I am counting on you to step up before Saturday's important deadline. "" Thanks for everything you do, Kamala Harris U.S. Senator, California Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Losing ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Republicans in Washington know they're losing ground. The American people aren't buying their tax scam. Families are getting tired of Republicans threatening access to health care, attacking Medicare, and ignoring the needs of the middle class. Republicans know all that. But instead of focusing on doing better, they're focusing on something else: **Raising money.** _"House Republicans will reel in their largest single fundraising haul of the 2018 midterm election cycle on Tuesday night, when President Donald Trump addresses donors at the National Republican Congressional Committee 's annual March dinner."
\-- Politico;_ 3/20/2018 We need you to step up now. We need resources to fight Donald Trump and **his dangerous agenda.** I'm working as hard as I can to protect Florida families. And if we are going to turn out the vote like never before, it's more important than ever I have you by my side. [_**But we're about 48 hours away from our first big FEC goal of the year, and we cannot fall behind.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fef/622b7b5b/1a0ad88c/307b8b62/388301669/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180328pm?refcode=dwse180328pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") [_**I'm asking you personally -- please rush in a contribution immediately.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fef/622b7b5b/1a0ad88c/307b8b62/388301669/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180328pm?refcode=dwse180328pm_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you for helping out today. Debbie
---

body:

| | | We don't want to let Martin down. We're still 386 donations from our FEC goal (the most important one this year!).

You can use this link to contribute now and answer Martin's challenge: [_**http://nm.martinheinrich.com/fec-challenge**_](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline-q1?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+httpnmmartinheinrichcomfecchallenge&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_3_4&source=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_3_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_180DO_180329_3_4")

Friend -- In a little over 72 hours, we face the most important deadline of my campaign.

What's the deadline? Our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing of 2018, after which I will have to publicly report how much money my campaign has in the bank.

**This FEC report will be pored over by everyone -- the media, my opponents, and dark-money groups -- to gauge whether I have the strength to win my first re-election campaign in November.**

We need to **prove we have what it takes to go toe-to-toe** with my two right-wing opponents, which means we need to post our biggest numbers yet. That's why we've set a goal of 575 grassroots donations before our Saturday deadline.

[_**Will you help us break a fundraising record before we file our first FEC report for 2018? Martin

That matters because **this report will set the tone for the rest of the year.** Florida Republicans, the media, and pundits will scour our public FEC report to see whether we're strong enough to grow our movement into a blue wave this November.

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Did you see what the IndyStar said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
IndyStar: "Indiana race for U.S. Senate generates most advertising IN THE NATION" And two-thirds of it is attacking Joe... |
---

| | **_IndyStar_ :
"Indiana race for U.S. Senate generates most advertising
IN THE NATION"
_And two-thirds of it is attacking Joe..._** **Will you help us fight back by pitching in whatever you can before our end-of-quarter deadline on Saturday?**
| _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238d/7377f838/31aa1d0a/51fa92a2/713744485/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.3nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238d/7377f838/31aa1d0a/51fa929d/713744485/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.3nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238d/7377f838/31aa1d0a/51fa929c/713744485/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.3nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238d/7377f838/31aa1d0a/51fa929f/713744485/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20180329.3nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238d/7377f838/31aa1d0a/51fa929e/713744485/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180329.3nd")****
We have a problem, Peter. Joe's race was already a **toss-up.** Some forecasters have even said it leans Republican. And now the Kochs have upped their investment to **_$6 million_** in Indiana, making this contest one of the most expensive in the country. Can you imagine how many Hoosiers they're reaching with $6 million this early in a campaign?!

If we don't fight back now, their constant, misleading attack ads could sink Joe before we get out of the starting gates. Their deceitful messages will get in voters' heads. **And Indiana will lose our best advocate in Washington in November.**
We know we're not going to be able to match every dollar of special interest money on the airwaves. Our plan is to beat them on the ground, with voter outreach, a massive field campaign, and a message that reminds Hoosiers that Joe is their champion in the Senate. It's how we won in 2012 -- and we'll do it again with your help.

Peter, we appreciate everything you've done for this campaign. But after looking at the numbers, we have to call on you again. **[Will you chip in $5 tonight to help Joe fight on the ground and on the air, defeat the special interests, and keep standing up for Indiana?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c238d/7377f838/31aa1d0a/51fa9299/713744485/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-marcheoq2018nd?refcode=20180329.3nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Team Donnelly
